recommendations.title: The Face of Another
recommendations.overview: A businessman with a disfigured face obtains a lifelike mask from his new doctor, but the mask starts altering his personality and causing him to question his identity.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Bionicle: The Legend Reborn
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Once the ruler of an entire universe, the Great Spirit Mata Nui finds himself cast out of his own body, his spirit trapped inside the fabled Mask of Life, hurtling through space. After landing on the far-away planet of Bara Magna, the mask creates a

recommendations.title: The Mask
recommendations.overview: Stanley Ipkiss, an insecure banker who has lost his zest for life stumbles upon an ancient mask, that turns him into a confident suave cartoon-like character who upsets his ordinary life.

recommendations.title: Bionicle: Mask of Light
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: With darkness encroaching on the island of Mata Nui, the only hope for the survival of the islanders rests with two Matoran villagers, who must find the seventh Toa and deliver to him the fabled Mask of Light.

recommendations.title: The Odd Life of Timothy Green
recommendations.overview: A childless couple bury a box in their backyard, containing all of their wishes for an infant. Soon, a child is born, though Timothy Green is not all that he appears.

recommendations.title: The Main Event
recommendations.overview: An 11-year-old aspiring wrestler enters a competition to become the next WWE superstar by using special powers from a magical mask.

recommendations.title: Slayers Return
recommendations.overview: Lina Inverse and Naga the White Serpent are back! What begins as a routine bandit-stomping turns into the adventure of a lifetime involving magical golems, an ancient Elven weapon and even someone bent on destroying the world. It's a predicament only

recommendations.title: A Dog's Purpose
recommendations.overview: A dog goes on quest to discover his purpose in life over the course of several lifetimes with multiple owners.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: New Nobita's Great Demon - Peko and the Exploration Party of Five
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Nobita is followed by a stray dog on his way home and decides to help it find its original owner with the help of Doraemon. They find out that the dog is actually a prince in its homeland in Africa.
